title: clinopodium serpyllifolium
intro: Clinopodium serpyllifolium, also known as Thyme-leaved Clinopodium or Rock mint, is a perennial plant in the mint family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Clinopodium serpyllifolium include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Clinopodium serpyllifolium can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in cooking and as a flavoring agent in traditional Mediterranean cuisine.
